scripts.typecheck: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check public/api-story-storage.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/home.js && node --check public/role-select.js && node --check tests/browser-smoke.test.mjs && node --check tests/lobby-navigation.test.mjs
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('web MVP is static; validation is performed by typecheck and node:test')"
